questions.question: Explain the basic operations that can be performed on a queue, and provide an example of each operation.
Write a Python code snippet to implement a queue using an array. Ensure it handles the case where the queue is full.
questions.hint: Use a constant for the maximum size of the array

questions.question: Describe the key differences between a circular queue and a double-ended queue. Provide an example of when each data structure would be used.
questions.hint: Circular: Last element is linked to the first, Double-Ended: Elements can be added/dequeued from both ends
